name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W212/S212, C207/A207 (6.2L V8 AMG)

serviceNotes.engine oil: M156 6.2L AMG: shorter oil intervals than standard E-Class (commonly 10,000 km / 12 months EU AMG plans; track use ~8,000 km).
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per AMG maintenance schedule.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: High-flow intake; follow ASSYST (~60,000 km planning).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: 45,000 km / 36 months — Mercedes-AMG M156 service manual supplement (W212 E 63).
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: AMG MCT/722.9: preventive fluid ~60,000 km specialist practice.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: M156: monitor from ~80,000 km if idle or throttle response issues.

serviceSources.engine oil: 10,000 km / 12 months — Mercedes-AMG M156 service manual supplement (W212 E 63); https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7614-2009/service has no AMG interval table
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-AMG W212; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W212 chassis reference)
serviceSources.engine air filter: 60,000 km / 48 months — Mercedes-AMG M156 service manual supplement (intake filter)
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W212 / AMG
serviceSources.spark plugs: 45,000 km / 36 months — Mercedes-AMG M156 service manual supplement (spark plugs)
serviceSources.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-AMG M156 service manual supplement (engine coolant renewal)
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: AMG MCT / 722.9 preventive ATF ~60,000 km — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: LSD rear axle oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~100,000 km under sustained high load — specialist practice
serviceSources.poly-V belt: Accessory belt ~80,000 km — AMG accessory drive preventive interval
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: M156 intake tract cleaning from ~80,000 km when idle or throttle symptoms — specialist practice
